# 🐺 LXR Ranch System

> **wolves.land — The Land of Wolves**

---

## 🏇 The Most Advanced Ranch System for RedM

Transform your RedM server into a living, breathing frontier ranch simulation. LXR Ranch System delivers deep livestock management, dynamic seasons, workforce systems, economy, and immersive UI — all in one escrow-protected package.

---

## ✨ Feature Highlights

- **13 Animal Species** — Cattle, horses, sheep, pigs, chickens, goats, ducks, turkeys, dogs, cats, alpaca, bees, rabbits
- **Advanced Genetics** — Breeding with bloodlines, trait inheritance, inbreeding penalties
- **Dynamic Seasons** — Spring/Summer/Autumn/Winter with unique weather, hazards, and bonuses
- **Workforce System** — Hire hands, assign roles, track morale and fatigue
- **Full Economy** — Dynamic pricing, contracts, auction house, ledger tracking
- **Law & Crime** — Rustling, sheriff bounties, insurance tiers, reputation system
- **Progression** — XP, skill trees (Husbandry, Veterinary, Teamster, Wrangler, Butcher), achievements
- **Western NUI** — Supreme-level responsive interface with authentic frontier aesthetic
- **Multi-Framework** — LXR Core, RSG Core, VORP Core, RedEM:RP, QBR Core, QR Core, Standalone

---

## 🔒 Escrow Protected

All gameplay logic is protected via Tebex escrow. The `config.lua` buyer control panel remains readable and editable.

---

## 🛠️ Framework Support

| Framework | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| LXR Core | ✅ Primary |
| RSG Core | ✅ Primary |
| VORP Core | ✅ Supported |
| RedEM:RP | ✅ Supported |
| QBR Core | ✅ Supported |
| QR Core | ✅ Supported |
| Standalone | ✅ Fallback |

---

## 📦 What's Included

- `config.lua` — Full buyer configuration panel
- `locales/` — English + Georgian translations
- `docs/` — INSTALL, CONFIG, FRAMEWORKS, EVENTS, TROUBLESHOOTING, CHANGELOG
